videos.title: The Fundamentals of LaRouche's Economics — Class 1
videos.description:
Participate in future classes: https://bit.ly/lar-econ

If anyone should be unemployed now, it should be the useless economists that destroyed our productive economy and created the basis for this pandemic. What nearly everyone on the planet thinks economics is, is completely wrong. It's not money. It's not finance, or world trade. In this class, I'll introduce to you Lyndon LaRouche's discoveries in the science of physical economy, which overturn every single chapter in your economics text book and are the basis of his forecasting of this pandemic twenty years ago. It's not true that, "No one could see this coming."

videos.title: What is Economic Value? --Class 2
videos.description:
Guess what? Money has NO value in an economy. None! As LaRouche repeatedly emphasized, "Money is an idiot." So what does have value? In this class, we'll discuss the physical scientific—not monetary—basis of economic value, and how we can use that to determine a policy for endless economic progress.

Join us in future classes https://bit.ly/lar-econ

videos.title: Dispensing with the Fraud of Limits to Growth -- Class 3
videos.description:
Join us in future classes https://bit.ly/lar-econ

Human beings are not animals. Despite that fact, today's global banking elite are attempting to impose a "Green New Deal" austerity policy on the world. This Greenie policy is not a new idea, but is simply the continuation of a policy of empire stretching back throughout all known human history. This imperial policy continues to hold mankind back by convincing the majority of the population that there are limited resources and therefore limits to human population growth! In this class, we'll show why there actually are NO limits to growth, in part, by discovering that human beings are not animals. We are unique and not restricted by "physical limitations."

videos.title: The Economic Value of Culture: What's Your Culture Worth? — Class #4
videos.description:
Participate in future classes and watch the previous classes: https://bit.ly/lar-econ

If humanity depends on new, revolutionary discoveries for its continued success, how can we ensure that such discoveries continue to happen? You can't force a discovery! You can't tell someone to just be an Einstein. In this class, we'll look at the importance of poetry and beautiful culture for a successful economic process, and break down the false division between science and art.

videos.title: The Real Meaning of Money, Can a Debt Be a Blessing? — Class 5
videos.description: Can debt actually be a good thing? The American System of economy, advanced by thinkers such as Hamilton, Carey, List, Lincoln, and Lyndon LaRouche, gives money a new—and valid—meaning as credit, as opposed the oligarchy's use of money as a tool to stop economic growth. At the core of the money issue is your view of mankind: are we just another animal, or something completely different? Identifying and using that difference between mankind and the animals in your economy is the secret to debt being a blessing, rather than a trap.

videos.title: The LaRouche Plan to Create 1.5 Billion Jobs Today Begins 500 Years in the Future -- Class 6

chapters.title: How do we face the crisis

videos.description: This is the last class in this series. We'll be exploring tonight exactly how we can implement the LaRouche Plan to create 1.5 Billion new productive jobs, build the World Land-Bridge, and ultimately our develop planets other than our current one. The class intends to pull together the concepts we discussed in previous classes: the value of classical culture versus the destructive effect of today's popular culture; the great blessing of debt to an economy; the superiority of the American system of political economy over the evil British imperial system; using LaRouche's concept of potential relative population density (PRPD) to determine the success or failure of an economy.
